data.biography:
Nanhoï Nikolai Kinski (born July 30, 1976 in Paris, France) is a film actor, and the only acknowledged son of the prolific actor Klaus Kinski and his third wife, Minhoi Geneviève Loanic. He is the half-brother of actresses Nastassja Kinski and Pola Kinski. Nikolai was born in France, but was raised in California, United States. He currently resides in Berlin, Germany and owns the dual citizenship of the United States and France.

Nikolai was the only one who attended the funeral of his father Klaus as his ashes were strewn in the Pacific Ocean.
data.name: Nikolai Kinski

data.biography: Nanhoï Nikolai Kinski（1976 年 7 月 30 日出生于法国巴黎）是一名电影演员，也是多产演员 Klaus Kinski 和他的第三任妻子 Minhoi Geneviève Loanic 的唯一公认儿子。他是女演员娜斯塔西娅·金斯基和波拉·金斯基的同父异母兄弟。尼古拉出生于法国，但在美国加利福尼亚州长大。他目前居住在德国柏林，拥有美国和法国的双重国籍。
data.name: 尼科莱·金斯基

data.biography: Nanhoï Nikolai Kinski（1976 年 7 月 30 日出生於法國巴黎）是一名電影演員，也是多產演員 Klaus Kinski 和他的第三任妻子 Minhoi Geneviève Loanic 的唯一公認兒子。他是女演員娜斯塔西婭·金斯基和波拉·金斯基的同父異母兄弟。尼古拉出生於法國，但在美國加利福尼亞州長大。他目前居住在德國柏林，擁有美國和法國的雙重國籍。
data.name: 尼科萊·金斯基
ニコライ・キンスキー

production_companies.name: Mandarin Motion Pictures 东方影业

data.biography:
Wu Jifeng is a musician and actor born in Benxi, Liaoning, China. He began studying calligraphy at an early age.

After watching an EXO performance in high school, he dreamed of joining a boy group, but his parents opposed it. As a result, he decided to major in Japanese at Southwest Minzu University after high school.

He pursued his dream by becoming a trainee at ETM Academy. Later, he appeared on "Produce Camp 2019" , where he reached the finals and ranked 20th overall. During this time, he also participated in the "Super Nova Games."
data.name: Wu Jifeng

data.biography: Saikumar, also credited as Sai Kumar, is an Indian actor who appears in Malayalam films. He's considered as one of the most versatile actors in Malayalam film industry.He is the son of Malayalam actor late Kottarakkara Sreedharan Nair.
data.name: Saikumar
